title: Review a cultivation prediction for selected inputs
description: A farmer can choose a region and crop, set capital and area, and see risk plus forecast insights after submitting the analysis.
category: Phân tích dự báo canh tác

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Select a growing region
Select a crop type
Adjust the capital amount
Enter a cultivation area
Submit the analysis request
Verify risk analysis results are displayed
Verify forecast insights are displayed

title: Get an agricultural answer from the AI assistant
description: A farmer can open the AI chat, ask an agricultural question, and see a grounded answer appear in the conversation thread.
category: Tư vấn tri thức nông nghiệp (RAG Chat)

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the AI assistant chat toggle
Fill in the chat input with a farming question about crop care
Submit the chat message
Verify an answer appears in the chat thread
Verify the response is shown as an assistant reply

title: Ask a crop-specific technique question and get guidance
description: A farmer can ask about a technique for a specific crop and receive relevant cultivation guidance in the chat thread.
category: Tư vấn tri thức nông nghiệp (RAG Chat)

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the AI assistant chat toggle
Fill in the chat input with a question about a cultivation technique for a specific crop
Submit the chat message
Verify a grounded agricultural guidance response appears
Verify the conversation thread contains the new answer

title: Log in to the admin dashboard and view statistics
description: An administrator can sign in, open the dashboard, and see the crop and regional analytics charts loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.html
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Verify the crop composition chart is displayed
Verify the regional activity chart is displayed

title: Upload a PDF knowledge document and trigger re-ingestion
description: An administrator can upload a valid PDF knowledge document, run the knowledge refresh action, and see the ingestion flow complete in the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.html
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Upload a valid PDF knowledge document
Trigger knowledge re-ingestion
Verify the ingestion completion state is visible
Verify the dashboard remains accessible after the update

title: Keep dashboard analytics visible after knowledge refresh
description: An administrator can complete a knowledge update and still return to the dashboard with analytics views available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.html
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Upload a valid PDF knowledge document
Trigger knowledge re-ingestion
Verify the crop composition chart is still displayed
Verify the regional activity chart is still displayed

title: Update prediction inputs before analyzing
description: A farmer can change the region, crop, capital, and area inputs and then see the analysis reflect the updated choices.
category: Phân tích dự báo canh tác

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Select a growing region
Select a crop type
Adjust the capital amount
Enter a cultivation area
Change the selected region
Change the selected crop
Submit the analysis request
Verify updated analysis results are displayed
Verify ROI and ecological risk insights are shown

title: Send a chat question with Enter
description: A farmer can submit a chat question using the keyboard and see the assistant response appear in the thread.
category: Tư vấn tri thức nông nghiệp (RAG Chat)

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the AI assistant chat toggle
Fill in the chat input with a farming question
Press Enter
Verify a new assistant response appears in the chat thread

title: Open and close the AI chat panel
description: A farmer can expand the assistant chat panel and close it again without losing access to the rest of the page.
category: Tư vấn tri thức nông nghiệp (RAG Chat)

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the AI assistant chat toggle
Verify the chat panel is visible
Click the AI assistant chat toggle again
Verify the chat panel is hidden

title: See validation when prediction inputs are incomplete
description: A farmer who tries to analyze without completing the required cultivation inputs sees validation feedback and no result is generated.
category: Phân tích dự báo canh tác

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Leave the required prediction inputs empty
Submit the analysis request
Verify input validation feedback is visible
Verify no prediction result is displayed
